server.error: Ups, algo salió mal, por favor contáctenos

labels.marketingConsent: Deseo recibir correos/WhatsApp sobre citas y noticias.

whoWeAre.title: 1. Who We Are
paragraphs: Nefar BV ("HelloMolar," "we," "us," or "our") respects your privacy. HelloMolar is developed and operated by:
Nefar BV
Sabadeco Shores 33
Kralendijk, Bonaire, Netherlands
Email: hello@hellomolar.com
Privacy Contact: privacy@hellomolar.com

scope.title: 2. Scope
bullets: Dental practices using HelloMolar for patient and staff management
Patients accessing HelloMolar through the mobile app or web portal
Users worldwide, with specific provisions for EU/EEA residents (GDPR), US residents (HIPAA, CCPA/CPRA), and other applicable jurisdictions

technical.title: Technical Data
bullets: Usage logs for security and analytics

howWeUseInformation.title: 4. How We Use Your Information
howWeUseInformation.intro: We process your data for the following purposes:
bullets: AI-powered features (e.g., data processing for scheduling and patient management), in compliance with privacy laws

legalBasis.title: 5. Legal Basis for Processing (EU/EEA Residents – GDPR)
legalBasis.intro: If you are in the EU/EEA, we process your personal data under the following bases:
bullets: Contractual necessity: To provide services you request
Legal obligation: To maintain records as required by law
Legitimate interests: To improve and secure our services
Consent: For marketing and optional services

hipaa.title: 6. HIPAA Compliance (US Residents)
paragraphs: For US dental practices, HelloMolar acts as a Business Associate under HIPAA.
We will sign Business Associate Agreements (BAAs) with covered entities.
Protected Health Information (PHI) is safeguarded with encryption, access controls, and audit logs.
We do not disclose PHI except as permitted by HIPAA.

ccpa.title: 7. CCPA/CPRA Rights (California Residents)
ccpa.intro: If you are a California resident, you have the right to:
bullets: Know what personal data we collect and why
Request access, correction, or deletion of your data
Opt-out of data sale (we do not sell personal data)
Not be discriminated against for exercising your rights

dataRetention.title: 8. Data Retention
paragraphs: We retain personal data for 10 years, unless a longer period is required by law (e.g., medical recordkeeping). After that, data is securely deleted or anonymized.

dataSharing.title: 9. Data Sharing and Transfers
paragraphs: We do not sell personal data.
We may share data with service providers (e.g., hosting, payment processors) under strict agreements.
We do not transfer personal data outside the EU or US without adequate safeguards.

securityMeasures.title: 10. Security Measures
bullets: Encryption at rest and in transit

yourRights.title: 11. Your Rights
yourRights.intro: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have the right to:
bullets: Access, correct, or delete your personal data
File a complaint with your supervisory authority (EU residents)
Request an accounting of disclosures (HIPAA patients)
yourRights.note: To exercise these rights, contact: privacy@hellomolar.com

cookies.title: 12. Cookies and Tracking
paragraphs: HelloMolar does not use cookies or third-party trackers.

childPrivacy.title: 13. Children’s Privacy
paragraphs: Our services are not directed to children under 16 without parental consent.

dataBreach.title: 14. Data Breach Notification
paragraphs: In case of a data breach, we will notify affected users and regulators as required by law (GDPR Articles 33–34, HIPAA Breach Notification Rule).

changes.title: 15. Changes to This Policy
paragraphs: We may update this Privacy Policy. Changes will be communicated via our app or website.

contact.title: 16. Contact Us
paragraphs: For any privacy concerns, please contact:
Nefar BV – HelloMolar
Email: privacy@hellomolar.com
